armorSystem.noseProtection: PReduceDamageToNose — specific damage reduction for bow hits
armorSystem.notes: Exact armor-to-damage-reduction curve is server-side only

ballInfo.damageFactor: Per-ammo multiplier applied to base cannon damage
ballInfo.damageToSails: Sail damage per hit (varies by ammo type)

bonuses.frontBackBonus: PFrontAndBackCannonsAddDamage — extra damage from bow/stern cannons

reloadMechanics.mendingPenalty: Reload speed drops to 15% while mending
reloadMechanics.shootingPenalty: Reload speed is 0% while actively shooting
reloadMechanics.singleShotBonus: PReloadingAfterSingleShot — bonus after firing one cannon at a time
reloadMechanics.crewEffect: WeaponsReloadingSpeedByCrew = ratio + ratio × (1 - ratio) / 2 × 0.75 (where ratio = sailors / crewCapacity)
reloadMechanics.falkonetReload: PFalkonetReloadBoost — swivel gun specific reload bonus

ramming.description: Ship-to-ship collision damage system. Damage is velocity-based and calculated server-side.

mechanics.velocityBased: ServerCollisionTestVelocity accumulates frame-by-frame movement during collision. Higher relative impact speed = more damage.
mechanics.softVsHard: Low-speed contacts are 'soft collisions' — ships push apart with no damage. High-speed impacts are 'hard collisions' with full damage and physics knockback.
mechanics.damageBonus: PAddCollisionDamage upgrade increases ram damage by X%
mechanics.npcBonuses: NPC bosses (tier 1 and tier 2) have PAddCollisionDamage in their bonus pools

criticalEffects.corpusCritical: Ram can punch a 'big hole' — ship speed drops to 30% for 10 seconds
criticalEffects.fireOnImpact: Some collisions start fires (InfiniteAllowMening burning type — fire that allows mending)
criticalEffects.destroyFlooding: BDestroyFloodingShopByCollision upgrade allows finishing off sinking ships by ramming (triggers SternDamage flag)

ramming.floodingInteraction: Ramming a flooding ship reduces their flooding by damage / maxHP
ramming.damageFormula: UNKNOWN — calculated server-side. Not present in Common.dll, WorldOfSeaBattleClient.dll, or nbloader.dll. Likely: damage = f(relativeVelocity, shipMass) × (1 + PAddCollisionDamage)

fields.Damage: float — pre-computed HP damage (set by server)
fields.UpgradeDestroyFloodingShip: bool — finishing blow on sinking ship

corpusCritical.effect: Creates a 'big hole' — speed reduced to 30% for duration

burningCritical.effect: Starts a fire on the ship requiring active firefighting
types: Other PredefinedBurningTypes for different fire behaviors
burningCritical.sources: Heated shots, phosphorous shots, ramming, powder kegs

cannonCritical.effect: Breaks a specific cannon, requiring repair
cannonCritical.index: UCritCannon identifies which cannon is damaged

crewDamage.data: CrewDamage byte array contains unit IDs of killed crew

sailDamage.singleSail: SingleSailDamage — damages one specific sail (identified by CollisionNodeID)
sailDamage.totalSail: TotalSailDamage — distributed across all sails (divided by sail weight)
sailDamage.speedDebuff: Sail hits cause temporary 10% speed reduction

sternDamage.effect: Special flag for stern hits — can stop flooding on sinking ships

bigFire.description: Major fires cause continuous HP damage. Requires active fighting (crew assigned).

microfire.description: Small fires at specific hit points. Auto-extinguish over time but can spread.

fireArea.description: Area-of-effect fire zones on the water (from phosphorous, etc.)

powderKegs.protection: PReducePowderKegDamage — damage reduction against keg explosions
powderKegs.anySpeedAllowed: BAllowPowderKegAnySpeed — normally can only deploy at certain speeds
powderKegs.description: Deployable explosive barrels. Detonate when enemy ships enter trigger radius.

damageEffectsOnShip.floodingFromDamage: Hull breaches cause flooding. Flooding stopped by: powder kegs, mortars, burning, stern damage, or ramming by ally.
